questionHtml:
Which of these reactions proceeds by a free radical mechanism in the presence of UV light?

A.     C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H5Cl + HCl

B.     C6H6 + 3H2 → C6H12

C.     CH2CH2 + HBr → CH3CH2Br

D.     CH3CH3 + Cl2 → CH3CH2Cl + HCl
